text:
Filipino gymnast Carlos Yulo scripted history atParis Olympics 2024with his double-gold medal win. Yulo made the Philippines proud by becoming the second Filipino athlete to win Olympic gold after weightlifter Hidilyn Diaz, who had won at the Tokyo Olympics 2020.

“I don’t know what to say. We are a really small country... So to be able to get a gold medal is big for us, huge. I dedicate this to the Filipino people who supported me,”Yulo said after his historic win, according toThe Guardian. The 24-year-old gymnast’s Olympic gold is being celebrated across the Philippines, and he's being showered withgiftsfrom all corners. Scroll down to know all the perks bestowed upon Carlos Yulo for his impressive run at Paris Olympics 2024.

Carlos Yulo has been gifted a fully furnished three-bedroom condo in Taguig City, Metro Manila,Philippines, according toThe Guardian. The home comes with a price tag of $552,802 (approximately Rs 4.6 crore).

According to the same report, Carlos Yulo will also receive a cash prize of $103,676 (approximately Rs 87 lakh) alongside a congressional medal. He is also due to receive ₱10 million (approximately Rs 1.4 crore) courtesy a Filipino law that promises incentives to athletes.

Carlos Yulo has also bagged a lifetime supply of freeramen, mac and cheese, chicken inasal, unlimited entry at the Philippines-based Vikings Luxury Buffet, and free food and drinks for life at a restaurant chain, according toHindustan Times.

According to the same report, Carlos Yulo will also receive freefurnitureworth ₱100,000 (approximately Rs 1.4 lakh).

According to Bleacher Report, Carlos Yulo has also been gifted unlimited free colonoscopies and gastroenterology consultations once he turns 45. This service is also available for any patients in need whom Yulo endorses, according toThe Guardian.

title: A 3-bedroom condo worth Rs 4.6 crore to a lifetime supply of ramen — here’s everything Filipino gymnast Carlos Yulo received for his historic double-gold medal win at Paris Olympics 2024 | GQ India
author: Karishma Shetty
description: Carlos Yulo is only the second Filipino athlete to win Olympic gold after weightlifter Hidilyn Diaz. Find out what he was gifted for his Paris Olympics 2024 win
